title: California Disability Evaluation Analyst Rates (CalCareers; base DEA + DEA III Authoritative)
description: California DDS Disability Evaluation Analyst (DEA) series, with current monthly salary ranges verified from the official CalCareers classification details: base Disability Evaluation Analyst (class 5365, entry/training/first-working level, $3,861-$6,276/mo) and Disability Evaluation Analyst III (class 5367, advanced journey, $6,031-$7,547/mo). DEA II (journey) and the first-line supervisor (generic Staff Services Manager I, Specialist) are NOT filled — the CalHR hrnet class-spec crossref pages are JS/session-gated and the CalHR alpha pay-scale PDF extracted with dropped salary columns. Bargaining: SEIU Local 1000 Bargaining Unit 4 (Office and Allied), CBA 2024-2027.

source.publisher: California Department of Human Resources (CalHR) / CalCareers; CA Dept of Social Services (CDSS) Disability Determination Service Division
source.title: CalCareers official classification details — Disability Evaluation Analyst series (current monthly ranges)

notes: Authoritative for the base Disability Evaluation Analyst (class 5365, $3,861-$6,276/mo) and Disability Evaluation Analyst III (class 5367, $6,031-$7,547/mo), whose current monthly ranges come from the official CalCareers classification details (live ExamBulletin pages). annual = monthly * 12. The base DEA is a deep class with alternate Ranges A/B/C; the recorded range is the current overall. PARTIAL GAPS (flagged in data_quality_flags): DEA II (journey) current standalone range was not retrievable (CalHR hrnet crossref JS-gated, returned empty) and the supervisor is the generic Staff Services Manager I (Specialist) class (figure not filled — CalHR alpha pay-scale PDF table extraction dropped the salary columns). 2023 spec-PDF per-range figures are retained as historical/supplementary only. CBA: SEIU Local 1000 Unit 4, 2024-2027.
